name: Heliox Harpoon Gunner
resist: bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing from nonmagical attacks

trait.name: Roof Stabilizers
entries: The Heliox Harpoon Gunner has advantage on Dexterity saving throws against effects that would knock it prone or push it while it is on a vehicle roof or exterior catwalk.

trait.name: Pinpoint Targeting
entries: The Heliox Harpoon Gunner ignores half cover.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Heliox Harpoon Gunner makes two Bolt Repeater attacks, or one Bolt Repeater attack and one Hookshot attack.

action.name: Bolt Repeater
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 8} to hit, range 120/480 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 2d8 + 5}) piercing damage.

action.name: Hookshot
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 8} to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@damage 2d6 + 4}) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 16 Strength saving throw or be pulled up to 15 feet toward the gunner.
